'''Idrish''' was a follower of the ''[[Jeedai heresy]]'' as a subordinate acolyte and rival of [[Nom Anor|Yu'shaa]]. A [[Shamed Ones|Shamed One]], he lived in the bowels of the newly crafted [[Yuuzhan'tar]] where he flocked to hear Yu'shaa speak. [[Kunra]] would be the individual to discover Idrish's plans to overthrow Yu'shaa and take his place, a plan which never came to fruition.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]'' {{1stm}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{1st}}
